hero.headline: Redefine What's Possible
hero.subheadline: AI-powered prosthetic rehabilitation with AR calibration and real-time progress tracking.

uploadModal.title: Upload Your Character
uploadModal.description: Upload a photo and we'll create a personalized 3D avatar for you.
uploadModal.dropzone: Drag & drop your image here, or click to browse

about.title: The mirror, gone digital
about.intro: We're Sam Sotil and Eliya Zakay, two CS students replacing the mirror in mirror therapy with a virtual limb, rendered in real time.
about.idea_desc: AR, computer vision, and 3D rendering in one platform people actually want to use.
about.does_desc: Patients train with a real-time virtual limb; therapists track progress and send plans remotely.
about.who_desc: People in rehab, the therapists guiding them, and the simply curious.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1_desc: Set up your account, choose your rehabilitation path, and connect with your therapist.
howItWorks.step2_desc: Computer vision technology that maps a virtual limb onto you in real time.
howItWorks.step3_desc: Follow personalized training programs and monitor recovery with detailed analytics.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your Liminal account

register.title: Join Liminal
register.patient_desc: Track your prosthetic rehabilitation with personalized training programs.
register.therapist_desc: Manage patients, build remote therapy plans, and track outcomes.
register.experience_desc: Explore prosthetic technology and AR interfaces.

dashboard.limb_select_hint: Select the limb you're training. It powers your AR session.
dashboard.ar_launch_tagline: Launch a guided session with your limb model
dashboard.ar_choose_first: Choose your limb in Limb Selection to begin
dashboard.ar_model_dialog_desc: Reuse the 3D model from your last session with {limb}, or try a different one.
dashboard.ar_try_another_sub: Choose a different limb in Limb Selection
dashboard.code_share_hint: Share this code with patients when they register
dashboard.no_patients_yet: No patients linked yet — share your code to get started
dashboard.welcome_sub_therapist: Here's an overview of your practice today.
dashboard.welcome_sub_experience: Explore prosthetic technology and AR interfaces.
dashboard.no_sessions_yet: No sessions yet — your training history will appear here.
dashboard.notifications_empty_desc: You're all caught up. New activity will show up here.
dashboard.total_patients_hint: All patients currently linked to your account.
dashboard.active_this_week_hint: Patients who completed at least one training session in the last 7 days.
dashboard.sessions_this_month_hint: Training sessions completed across all your patients this month.
dashboard.avg_progress_hint: Average rehabilitation progress across your active patients.
dashboard.recovery_rate_hint: Share of patients showing measurable improvement over the period.
dashboard.discharge_ready_hint: Patients whose progress meets the threshold to be considered for discharge.
dashboard.avg_sessions_hint: Average number of training sessions completed per patient.
dashboard.retention_hint: Share of patients who stay active rather than dropping off.
dashboard.not_linked_therapist: Not linked to a therapist yet — add a code in Settings.
dashboard.program_empty: No program yet. Plans your therapist sends will appear here.
dashboard.plan_send_failed: Could not send the plan. Please try again.
dashboard.feedback_placeholder: Write personal feedback for the patient...
dashboard.feedback_send_failed: Could not send feedback. Please try again.
dashboard.feedback_empty_patient: No feedback from your therapist yet

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
settings.email_change_note: Changing your email requires confirmation from your inbox.
settings.save_failed: Could not save. Please try again.
settings.notifications_desc: Choose what you want to be notified about
settings.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters
settings.danger_desc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data
settings.delete_confirm_desc: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All of your data will be removed.
settings.therapist_code_desc: Share this code with your patients so they can link to you during registration
settings.regenerate_confirm_desc: Your current code will stop working. Patients who haven't linked yet will need the new code.
settings.my_therapist_desc: The therapist linked to your account
settings.no_therapist: You are not linked to a therapist yet.
settings.link_failed: Invalid code. Please check and try again.
settings.dob_readonly: Date of birth cannot be changed.
settings.no_code_yet: You don't have a code yet. Generate one to share with your patients.
settings.code_generate_failed: Could not generate a code. Please try again.

welcome.title: Welcome to Liminal
welcome.body_patient: Let's take a quick tour of your rehabilitation space — how to start an AR session, where your virtual limb appears, and how to track your progress.
welcome.body_therapist: Let's take a quick tour of your practice dashboard — your patient files, the remote plan builder, and your therapist code.
welcome.body_experience: Let's take a quick tour — how to start the experience and see your virtual limb come to life.

start.title: Start an AR session
start.body: This is the heart of your training — launch a guided AR session with your virtual limb from here.

limb.title: Your virtual limb
limb.body: Your selected 3D limb model appears here and in your AR session. Pick or change it under Limb Selection.

progress.title: Track pain & progress
progress.body: Your session history and recovery scores over time live here — review them after every session.

plan.title: Your treatment plan
plan.body: The exercises and goals your therapist sends you show up here, in My Program.

summary.title: Practice overview
summary.body: A quick summary of your practice — total patients, weekly activity, and average progress at a glance.

patients.title: Patient files
patients.body: All of your linked patients live here. Open any file to review their details and history.

plan.title: Remote plan builder
plan.body: Open a patient's file to build and send them a personalized training plan remotely.

code.title: Your therapist code
code.body: Share this code so patients can link to you when they register. You'll always find it here in Settings.

start.title: Start the experience
start.body: Pick a limb model here to begin — that's all it takes to start exploring.

limb.title: See the virtual limb
limb.body: Your virtual limb and real-time AR layer come to life here, in the Design Interface.

ar_instructions.title: AR Training
ar_instructions.subtitle: A quick look at how your session works — it only takes a moment.

camera.title: Open your camera
camera.body: Tap “Open camera” and allow camera access when your browser asks. Your video stays on your device — nothing is recorded or uploaded.

frame.title: Step into frame
frame.body: Stand a couple of steps back so your whole body is in view. Training calibrates to your body automatically — no setup needed.

limb.title: Watch your limb appear
limb.body: Your selected 3D limb is overlaid on your body in real time and mirrored, just like looking in a mirror.

adjust.title: Adjust anytime
adjust.body: Tap “Recalibrate” if the fit drifts, and use the Mirror and Show skeleton toggles to fine-tune the view.
